strengths: Direct recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure (MCP frameworks, agentic workflows)
Strong distributed-systems and backend expertise with event-driven architectures (Dlang, microservices, real-time systems)
Proven leadership in scaling engineering teams and establishing technical governance (Altom, RIDE Capital, re:cinq)
concerns: Limited fintech-specific experience (no clear roles in credit systems, payments, or embedded finance)
No demonstrated experience operating multi-agent AI systems in regulated or high-stakes commercial environments
Short tenure at recent roles (e.g., re:cinq: 6 months) raises questions about long-term commitment or stability
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong technical leadership and distributed-systems expertise, with recent direct involvement in AI-agent infrastructure development. However, his lack of fintech-specific experience and limited exposure to regulated environments pose significant risks for the CTO role. His short tenures at recent positions also warrant further scrutiny about alignment with venture-backed scale-up expectations.
